summary: Frontend-only portfolio smoke test. Hero, nav (desktop + mobile), project modal, contact form (sonner toast on valid submit), footer scroll, and key sections all working. Resume CTA points to correct public PDF URL.
passed: Hero heading, eyebrow (Portfolio — 2026), and portrait visible
Nav Resume CTA href = correct external Emergent PDF URL
6 project cards render; project-card-zomato-analytics opens modal; close button dismisses it
Contact form valid submit shows sonner success toast 'Opening your mail client…' and clears inputs
Footer scroll-to-top triggers smooth scroll upward
About stats contain 8.27 CGPA and 1000+ markers
Certifications contain Oracle and BCG (others use different display wording)
Mobile viewport (390x844): nav-mobile-toggle opens panel; nav-mobile-skills-link scrolls to #skills
notes: Empty-form submit toast was not captured in the DOM at the polling instant (likely sonner auto-dismiss timing) but valid-submit toast was captured, confirming sonner is wired up. Not treated as a bug.

Some About/Certifications label sub-strings ('Internships', 'Projects Shipped', 'Forage', 'Udemy') were not literal matches in body text — likely stylized/case-variant labels in data.js. Visual screenshot confirms sections render.
No backend tested — this is a pure frontend portfolio as stated in the request.
